privileged_info_summary: The task 'add_meeting_attendees@1' operates on a synthetic Odoo 17 calendar database. The target event 'Product Roadmap Planning' is created during environment setup with initial attendees: Alice Johnson (Senior Financial Analyst), David Chen (Lead Engineer), and Emma Thompson (Product Manager). The task requires adding two additional attendees: Henry Kim (VP Operations) and Isabel Santos (Customer Success Manager). All contacts are synthetic but realistic, created with full names, company email addresses (@northbridge.org), and job titles during Odoo initialization. The event is stored in the Odoo calendar.event model and accessed via XMLRPC API at http://localhost:8069. An anti-gaming measure verifies event ID and creation date remain unchanged (modification, not recreation). The verifier checks 7 conditions: event existence (10 pts), event ID/date match (10 pts), Henry Kim added (20 pts), Isabel Santos added (20 pts), and retention of Alice Johnson (10 pts), David Chen (10 pts), Emma Thompson (10 pts).
